title: Easy Netherite Forge
description: Easy Netherite Ingot, Scrap and Smithing Template
body:
Easy Netherite Ingot, Scrap and Smithing Template

You can make a Netherite Ingot with 4 Ender Pearls, 4 Iron Ingots and 1 Daimond
![Netherite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e9cec88b0e8ee3f4045eb3b4657649af790d2fc.png)

You can make a Netherite Scrap with 1 Ender Pearl, 1 Iron Ingots and 1 Gold Ingot
![Netherite Scrap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d572879067a1cf048ce83dad40870d1b2cfa146.png)

You can make a Netherite Smithing Template with 7 Netherite Scraps, 1 Netherite Ingot and 1 Diamond
![Netherite Smithing Template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e6b0f26a6c27ab385c8806f1736583ec4874b3.png)
